findings.description: claude-mem@thedotmack Stop hook outputs non-JSON text causing 'JSON validation failed' on every Stop event
findings.rootCause: bun-runner.js uses opt-out pattern (===false check) instead of opt-in (===true), plus worker stdout=inherit pipes non-JSON summary text to Claude Code hook capture
findings.fix: Added hooks.Stop:[] to clear all Stop hooks + claude-mem@thedotmack:false in enabledPlugins

config.symptom: Stop hook error: JSON validation failed
